message:
perf: speed up close-time template subgraph loading (GH#2458)

Use GetDependentsWithMetadata to filter parent-child edges directly
instead of N+1 dependency lookups. Use IDPrefix filter instead of
scanning all issues for hierarchical children. ~36x faster on
synthetic hierarchies.

Co-Authored-By: Cardosaum <Cardosaum@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
